data.title: MGI Tech Celebrates 10 Years of Innovation, Empowering 3,560 Users Across Six Continents
data.description: Celebrating its 10th anniversary, MGI Tech Co., Ltd. (MGI), headquartered in Shenzhen, China, has been a pioneer in developing essential tools and technologies for the life sciences sector. Over the past decade, MGI has made significant strides in revolutionizing genomics. Since its establishment in April 2016, the company has made numerous breakthroughs in the field. Through its dedication to innovation, MGI has driven advancements that have reshaped genomics into a dynamic and evolving field.

UBS now expects AVGO alone to ship around 7 million TPUs in C27, up from its prior estimate of roughly 6 million. Once you add MediaTek volumes on top of that, how large will total TPU shipments actually be…? $AVGO

data.title: If You Invested $1,000 In Trump Memecoin At Its Peak Before Presidential Inauguration, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
data.description: The official Trump memecoin, launched shortly before President Donald Trump's inauguration, has been a major disappointment for investors. The Solana-based token, symbolized as TRUMP, has plummeted by 96% from its all-time high of $75.35 reached in January 2025. During its peak, the coin reached a market capitalization of $9 billion, with a fully diluted valuation of $75 billion including Trump-affiliated assets. However, by April 2026, the market capitalization of the coin has dropped to $655 million, with a fully diluted valuation of $2.82 billion. This dramatic decline has turned it into a significant setback for those who bought into the initial hype.

data.title: Sandmark Crypto Intelligence Report Shows Credible Insight Drives Investment Confidence
data.description: Nearly 4 out of 10 finance professionals who have invested in cryptocurrency see it as a promising opportunity for growth with significant potential upside. A striking 96% of professional investors express positivity regarding the future of cryptocurrency as an asset, in contrast to only 39% of novice investors who share this optimistic view. data.title: Lundbeck to showcase new neurology data at the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting
data.description: Seven abstracts have been presented showcasing data on migraine, childhood-onset epilepsy, and multiple system atrophy (MSA). These abstracts demonstrate Lundbeck's focus on biology-driven methods in developing treatments for severe brain diseases. Newly revealed Phase 1 safety and tolerability data for bocunebart (Lu...) were shared orally during the event.

data.title: ADS-TEC Energy Reports Preliminary and Unaudited Financial Results
data.description: In NÜRTINGEN, Germany, ADS-TEC Energy PLC (NASDAQ: ADSE) disclosed its preliminary and unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements for 2025, ending on December 31. 2025 marked a transition and strategic positioning year for the global leader in battery-based energy storage and fast-charging systems. The financial figures for the year were modest due to these strategic shifts, but the Company remained on track with its operations.

data.title: CHINT Showcased Its Largest Presence at FEICON 2026 and Announces Local Assembly of Air Circuit Breaker in Brazil
data.description: SAO PAULO, April 13, 2026 - CHINT, a prominent company specializing in smart energy solutions, recently attended FEICON 2026, the primary construction and architecture trade show in Latin America held from April 7 to 10 at São Paulo Expo. This event marked CHINT's third consecutive presence, showcasing its innovative products and technologies to a wide audience.
